title: neptunia major
intro: Neptunia major, also known as the water morning-glory or water bluebell, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and treat respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and acting as a natural diuretic to aid in digestion and relieve urinary issues. Neptunia major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible treatment option for various health conditions.
